get.description: Get all companies with pending verification status. Requires admin role.

post.description: Process a company verification request (approve or reject). Requires admin role.

get.description: Get all applications for the authenticated jobseeker (kanban-style data with job title and company name)
Company lists the message thread for an application it owns

post.description: Company adds a note/message to an application it owns (visible to the candidate)
post.summary: Add a note to an application

put.description: Update an application's status (reviewed, interviewed, offered, rejected). Company action for verified companies.

post.description: Send a password reset link if the email belongs to an account. Always responds with the same message to prevent account enumeration.
Authenticate with email and password. Sets a refresh token cookie and returns an access token.
Revoke all refresh tokens for the authenticated user and clear the refresh cookie.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's account info (works for all roles, unlike /profiles/me which is jobseeker-only).

post.description: Exchange a valid refresh token (from cookie) for a new access token. Rotates the refresh token.
Create a new user account (jobseeker or company). Sets a refresh token cookie and returns an access token.
Send a fresh verification link to the authenticated user's email.
Set a new password using a reset token from the emailed link. Revokes all existing sessions.

get.description: Consume an email-verification token (from the emailed link) and mark the account verified.
Get candidate recommendations for a specific job posting based on skill matching

parameters.description: Job posting UUID to find candidates for
parameters.name: jobId

get.description: Aggregate hiring metrics for the authenticated verified company: jobs, applications by status, time-to-decision, per-job funnels
Get all applications for jobs owned by the authenticated verified company
Get the authenticated company's profile

put.description: Update the authenticated company's profile fields (company name, website, industry, description)

post.description: Submit business verification documents for company approval

get.description: Get the current verification status for the authenticated company
List the authenticated company's registered webhooks (secrets omitted)

post.description: Register a webhook URL. The signing secret is returned once — store it; events are signed with HMAC-SHA256 in the X-SkillPass-Signature header.

delete.description: Delete a webhook owned by the authenticated company

post.description: Trigger a fresh AI evaluation of the authenticated jobseeker's profile and experiences
Generate AI career path recommendations from the authenticated jobseeker's profile and latest evaluation

get.description: Get the most recent AI evaluation result for the authenticated jobseeker
Returns server health status with current timestamp
Get all industry categories for filtering
Get all open job postings with optional filters

parameters.description: Filter by experience level (entry, mid, senior, lead)
parameters.name: experience_level

post.description: Create a new job posting for the authenticated company

get.description: Get job recommendations based on the authenticated jobseeker's skills and AI evaluation
Get all job postings for the authenticated company
Get a single job posting by ID

put.description: Update specific fields of a job posting owned by the authenticated company

delete.description: Delete a job posting owned by the authenticated company

post.description: Apply the authenticated jobseeker to a job posting

get.description: Compare the authenticated jobseeker's evaluated skills against a job's required skills
Get recent notifications and unread count for the authenticated user

put.description: Mark all unread notifications as read for the authenticated user
Mark a single notification as read

get.description: Server-rendered HTML with per-profile Open Graph tags for crawlers; redirects humans to the SPA passport. Does not increment the view counter.
Get the authenticated jobseeker's full profile (including experiences)

put.description: Update the authenticated jobseeker's profile fields (headline, about, years of experience, slug)

get.description: Application counts by status, response rate, and passport views for the authenticated jobseeker

post.description: Upload a profile image (png/jpeg/webp, max 2MB) as multipart field "file". Updates the user's avatarUrl.
Add a new employment, gig, education, certification, project, or volunteering entry to the profile

put.description: Update specific fields of an experience entry owned by the authenticated jobseeker

delete.description: Delete an experience entry owned by the authenticated jobseeker

post.description: Extract structured profile data (headline, about, experiences) from pasted resume text using AI. Does not modify the profile — the client reviews and saves entries.
Upload a PDF resume as multipart field "file"; its text is extracted and parsed by AI into structured experiences. Text-based PDFs only (scanned PDFs need OCR and are rejected as unreadable).

get.description: Get a jobseeker's public profile by username/slug (no auth required)
Search for jobseeker candidates by keyword, skills, and industry. Requires verified company auth.

parameters.description: Text search query (matches name, headline, about)
parameters.name: q

get.description: Get skill tags, optionally filtered by industry category

parameters.description: Industry category ID to filter tags by
parameters.name: industry
